en: Last week I gave a fire safety talk, and nobody paid any attention. It's my own fault for using PowerPoint.
ko: 지난주에 화재 안전 교육을 했는데, 아무도 관심을 안 가졌어요. 파워포인트를 쓴 제 잘못이죠.

en: PowerPoint is boring. People learn in lots of different ways.
ko: 파워포인트는 지루해요. 사람들은 다양한 방법으로 배우거든요.

en: But experience is the best teacher.
Today, smoking is going to save lives.
